name: Enemy & Hazard Rebalancing + Full Validation Pass
theme: Enemy density caps, hazard percentage limits, platform width enforcement, mechanics gating, full validation sweep achieving 100% PASS
features: F24 + F25: Integration validation — all 13 stages PASS all categories

criteria.description: All World 1 stages (1-1, 1-2, 1-3) have at most 2 enemies per visible screen width
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Inspect stages 1-1, 1-2, 1-3 difficultyResult.enemyDensity
Verify each reports maxPerScreen <= 2 and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 1 stages have difficultyResult.enemyDensity.result = PASS with maxPerScreen <= 2

criteria.description: All World 2 stages (2-1, 2-2, 2-3) have at most 3 enemies per visible screen width
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Inspect stages 2-1, 2-2, 2-3 difficultyResult.enemyDensity
Verify each reports maxPerScreen <= 3 and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 2 stages have difficultyResult.enemyDensity.result = PASS with maxPerScreen <= 3

criteria.description: All World 3 stages (3-1, 3-2, 3-3) have at most 4 enemies per visible screen width
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Inspect stages 3-1, 3-2, 3-3 difficultyResult.enemyDensity
Verify each reports maxPerScreen <= 4 and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 3 stages have difficultyResult.enemyDensity.result = PASS with maxPerScreen <= 4

criteria.description: All World 4 stages (4-1, 4-2, 4-3) have at most 5 enemies per visible screen width
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Inspect stages 4-1, 4-2, 4-3 difficultyResult.enemyDensity
Verify each reports maxPerScreen <= 5 and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 4 stages have difficultyResult.enemyDensity.result = PASS with maxPerScreen <= 5

criteria.description: Citadel stage (5-1) has at most 5 enemies per visible screen width
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Inspect stage 5-1 difficultyResult.enemyDensity
Verify maxPerScreen <= 5 and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: Stage 5-1 difficultyResult.enemyDensity.result = PASS with maxPerScreen <= 5

criteria.description: All 13 stages pass the enemy density check in the validator
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Iterate all 13 stage results
Count how many have difficultyResult.enemyDensity.result = PASS
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have difficultyResult.enemyDensity.result = PASS

criteria.description: All World 1 stages (1-1, 1-2, 1-3) have hazard tile percentage at most 5%
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Inspect stages 1-1, 1-2, 1-3 difficultyResult.hazardPercentage
Verify actual <= 5.0 and result is PASS for each
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 1 stages have difficultyResult.hazardPercentage.result = PASS with actual <= 5%

criteria.description: All World 2 stages (2-1, 2-2, 2-3) have hazard tile percentage at most 10%
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Inspect stages 2-1, 2-2, 2-3 difficultyResult.hazardPercentage
Verify actual <= 10.0 and result is PASS for each
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 2 stages have difficultyResult.hazardPercentage.result = PASS with actual <= 10%

criteria.description: All World 3 stages (3-1, 3-2, 3-3) have hazard tile percentage at most 15%
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Inspect stages 3-1, 3-2, 3-3 difficultyResult.hazardPercentage
Verify actual <= 15.0 and result is PASS for each
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 3 stages have difficultyResult.hazardPercentage.result = PASS with actual <= 15%

criteria.description: All World 4 stages (4-1, 4-2, 4-3) and Citadel (5-1) have hazard tile percentage at most 20%
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Inspect stages 4-1, 4-2, 4-3, 5-1 difficultyResult.hazardPercentage
Verify actual <= 20.0 and result is PASS for each
criteria.threshold: All 4 stages (4-1, 4-2, 4-3, 5-1) have difficultyResult.hazardPercentage.result = PASS with actual <= 20%

criteria.description: All 13 stages pass the hazard percentage check in the validator
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Iterate all 13 stage results
Count how many have difficultyResult.hazardPercentage.result = PASS
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have difficultyResult.hazardPercentage.result = PASS

criteria.description: All World 1 stages (1-1, 1-2, 1-3) have minimum safe platform width of 3 tiles
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Inspect stages 1-1, 1-2, 1-3 difficultyResult.minPlatformWidth
Verify narrowest >= 3 and result is PASS for each
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 1 stages have difficultyResult.minPlatformWidth.result = PASS with narrowest >= 3

criteria.description: All World 2 and World 3 stages have minimum safe platform width of 2 tiles
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Inspect stages 2-1, 2-2, 2-3, 3-1, 3-2, 3-3 difficultyResult.minPlatformWidth
Verify narrowest >= 2 and result is PASS for each
criteria.threshold: All 6 World 2+3 stages have difficultyResult.minPlatformWidth.result = PASS with narrowest >= 2

criteria.description: All World 4 stages (4-1, 4-2, 4-3) and Citadel (5-1) have minimum safe platform width of 1 tile
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Inspect stages 4-1, 4-2, 4-3, 5-1 difficultyResult.minPlatformWidth
Verify narrowest >= 1 and result is PASS for each
criteria.threshold: All 4 stages (4-1, 4-2, 4-3, 5-1) have difficultyResult.minPlatformWidth.result = PASS with narrowest >= 1

criteria.description: All 13 stages pass the minimum platform width check in the validator
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Iterate all 13 stage results
Count how many have difficultyResult.minPlatformWidth.result = PASS
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have difficultyResult.minPlatformWidth.result = PASS

criteria.description: World 1 stages only use walk, jump, and basic attack mechanics (wall-jump introduced in 1-2, not required in 1-1)
testSteps: Review stage 1-1 level data and enemy configurations
Verify no enemies or level sections require wall-jump, swimming, or ice physics in stage 1-1
Verify wall-jump is first introduced in stage 1-2 with clear visual cues
Verify stage 1-3 may use wall-jump but not swimming or ice
criteria.threshold: Stage 1-1 completable with walk/jump/attack only; wall-jump introduced in 1-2; no swimming or ice in World 1

criteria.description: Swimming mechanics are not required before stage 2-3 (Oasis Mirage) where they are introduced
testSteps: Review stages 1-1 through 2-2 level data for water/swimming tiles or mechanics
Verify no water sections exist in stages before 2-3
Verify stage 2-3 introduces swimming
criteria.threshold: No water/swimming mechanics appear in stages 1-1 through 2-2; swimming starts in 2-3

criteria.description: Ice physics are not required before stage 3-1 (Frozen Lake) where they are introduced
testSteps: Review stages 1-1 through 2-3 level data for ice tiles or reduced friction mechanics
Verify no ice physics exist in stages before 3-1
Verify stage 3-1 introduces ice physics
criteria.threshold: No ice tiles or ice physics in stages 1-1 through 2-3; ice starts in 3-1

criteria.description: All 13 stages pass path validation (pathResult = PASS) in the final validation sweep
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Iterate all 13 stage results
Count how many have pathResult = PASS
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have pathResult = PASS

criteria.description: All 13 stages pass all arena validation checks (enclosure, minWidth, platforms, entry)
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
For each stage, check arenaResult.enclosure.result, arenaResult.minWidth.result, arenaResult.platforms.result, arenaResult.entry.result
Verify all 52 checks (13 stages x 4 checks) report PASS
criteria.threshold: 52/52 arena checks PASS (0 FAIL across all 13 stages)

criteria.description: All 13 stages pass all 5 difficulty parameter checks (vulnerabilityWindow, bossHP, enemyDensity, hazardPercentage, minPlatformWidth)
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
For each stage, check all 5 difficultyResult sub-checks for PASS
Verify all 65 checks (13 stages x 5 checks) report PASS
criteria.threshold: 65/65 difficulty checks PASS (0 FAIL across all 13 stages)

criteria.description: window.runPlayabilityCheck() reports 0 total failures across all categories for all 13 stages
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Check the top-level report aggregate counts (failCount or categoryCounts)
Verify total failures = 0 and total passes covers all checks
criteria.threshold: Top-level report shows 0 failures; every individual check across all 13 stages is PASS

criteria.description: The full validation report has 13 stages, each with pathResult, arenaResult (4 sub-checks), and difficultyResult (5 sub-checks) — totaling 130 individual checks, all PASS
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Count: 13 stages x (1 path + 4 arena + 5 difficulty) = 130 individual checks
Verify all 130 report PASS
criteria.threshold: 130/130 total checks PASS across all 13 stages and all categories

criteria.description: Enemy spawns are reduced by removing or repositioning enemies in stages that exceeded per-world density limits, not by changing the validator thresholds
testSteps: Review git diff for changes to level.js / enemies.js enemy spawn data
Verify enemy spawn positions were removed or repositioned in overly-dense stages
Verify validator.js density thresholds remain unchanged from Sprint 14
criteria.threshold: Level data was modified to reduce enemy density; validator thresholds untouched

criteria.description: Hazard tiles are reduced by replacing some hazard tiles with safe tiles in stages that exceeded per-world percentage limits, not by changing the validator thresholds
testSteps: Review git diff for changes to level.js hazard tile data
Verify hazard tiles (spikes, lava) were replaced with solid or empty tiles in stages that exceeded limits
Verify validator.js hazard percentage thresholds remain unchanged from Sprint 14
criteria.threshold: Level tile data was modified to reduce hazard percentage; validator thresholds untouched

criteria.description: Narrow platforms are widened in stages that failed minimum platform width checks, not by changing the validator thresholds
testSteps: Review git diff for changes to level.js platform tile data
Verify narrow platforms were widened (additional solid tiles added) in World 1 stages where platforms were < 3 tiles
Verify validator.js platform width thresholds remain unchanged from Sprint 14
criteria.threshold: Level tile data was modified to widen platforms; validator thresholds untouched

criteria.description: All boss vulnerability window checks still pass after enemy/hazard modifications (Sprint 15 regression)
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Verify all 13 stages have difficultyResult.vulnerabilityWindow.result = PASS
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have vulnerabilityWindow.result = PASS

criteria.description: All boss HP checks still pass after enemy/hazard modifications (Sprint 15 regression)
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck()
Verify all 13 stages have difficultyResult.bossHP.result = PASS
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have bossHP.result = PASS

criteria.description: Game runs at 60fps after level data modifications
testSteps: Load the game, enter a stage
Check window.__gameDebug.fps
criteria.threshold: FPS >= 55 during normal gameplay

criteria.description: Debug overlay still opens with D key on title screen and shows all validation categories (PATH, ARENA, DIFF) with per-stage results
testSteps: On title screen press D to open overlay
Verify all 3 categories (PATH, ARENA, DIFF) are visible per stage
Verify all checks show PASS (green) after Sprint 16 fixes
Press Escape to close
criteria.threshold: Debug overlay opens, shows all categories, all checks are PASS, closes with Escape

outOfScope: Adding new enemy types or boss mechanics
Modifying the validator check logic or thresholds (Sprint 14 already built these)
Changing boss vulnerability windows or HP (Sprint 15 already tuned these)
Modifying boss arena layouts (Sprint 15 already fixed these)
Adding new game features or mechanics
notes: This is the FINAL sprint. It modifies level data (enemy spawns, hazard tiles, platform widths) in level.js and enemies.js to bring all 13 stages into compliance with the difficulty table. The validator from Sprint 14 is the automated test suite — its thresholds MUST NOT be changed. Sprint 15 already fixed boss parameters, arenas, and path validation. Sprint 16 fixes the remaining three categories: enemy density, hazard percentage, and minimum platform width. The key deliverable is that window.runPlayabilityCheck() returns 0 failures across ALL categories for ALL 13 stages — a clean bill of health for the entire game. This serves as the final regression criterion confirming the complete difficulty curve rebalancing.
